ptxt.intxrefpoff: Output Shaft Speed Sensor Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Connect positive cable of 12 volt battery to terminal (1) of sensor and ground cable to terminal (2). Then using voltmeter, check voltage between terminal (3) and terminal (2) while rotating output shaft speed sensor driven gear.
If measured voltage (pulse signal) is not as specified, replace output shaft speed sensor.

spec.title: Output shaft speed sensor output voltage
spec.ptxt: Pulse signal of alternating 0 – 2 V and 10 – 14 V

item.ptxt: Check output shaft speed sensor driven gear (1) for wear.
